Terms and Conditions

These GeniusCash Promotion Terms and Conditions (the "GeniusCash Promotion Terms") govern this WeyMedia Inc. GeniusCash promotional offer (the GeniusCash and the promotional offer via which it is offered, collectively, the "Promotion"). The Promotion is available to you ("You", "Your" or the "Participant") only through moneyGenius.ca, creditcardGenius.ca, or the GeniusCash mobile app (collectively, the "Platform"), and is only valid online through these platforms. The WeyMedia Privacy Policy, Terms of Service (the "Terms"), and these GeniusCash Terms and Conditions (the “GeniusCash Terms”) appearing on the Platform form part of these GeniusCash Promotion Terms and are incorporated by reference herein, and You hereby agree to be bound by the same.

MBNA ("MBNA") is the issuer (the "Issuer") of the MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard account (the "Product" or “MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard”), and shall not be responsible or liable for any aspect of the Promotion. Any promotions, including the Promotion, which are offered through the Platform are not affiliated with the Issuer in any manner whatsoever. The Issuer is further harmless for any information disclosed to the Platform. Without limiting the generality of the foregoing, the Issuer is not liable to You in any manner whatsoever should You be declined for the Product.

You are deemed to accept these GeniusCash Terms upon Your participation in the Promotion from the moment You click upon the Application Link (defined below) and submit an application for the Product. In addition to the foregoing, You are deemed to accept these Terms whether or not you qualify for the Promotion.

The Promotion opens on January 01, 2026 at 12:00 PM AT and closes on February 28, 2026 at 11:59 AM AT (the "Offer Period").

To qualify for the Promotion, You must:

  1. Not currently have or have had at any time a MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard. The Promotion is open only to new applicants for the MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard who have not before held a MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard either in their name or jointly with another individual or entity. Other MBNA terms and conditions may apply to qualify for the full welcome bonus.
  2. Click on the specified link on the Platform to apply for the Product (the "Application Link"). Applications must originate from the specified link on the Platform. Applications placed over the phone, through online chat, or any other method whatsoever will not be valid.
  3. Provide contact details to the Platform as requested, including Your full name and email address, which must exactly match the details used to apply for the Product. If any details are inconsistent or do not match, then the Promotion is invalid.
  4. Complete the application for the MBNA Rewards World Elite Mastercard found at the Application Link and receive confirmation from the Issuer that the application for the Product has been approved.

Under no circumstance will WeyMedia Inc. (carrying on business as moneyGenius.ca, creditcardGenius.ca, and the GeniusCash mobile app) be in any way responsible or liable for the approval of applications for the Product.

By clicking on the Application Link, You:

  1. Acknowledge and agree that in order to protect Your privacy and the privacy of Your information, the Platform will not share Your personal information with the Issuer, nor will the Issuer share Your personal Information with the Platform unless a tracking failure occurs, and it becomes necessary to fulfill the Promotion, and determine Your eligibility for the GeniusCash.
  2. In the case of a tracking error, or other difficulty in determining Your eligibility for the Promotion, consent to Us using Your full name and e-mail address to verify approved Product applications, and You authorize Us to receive account information from the Issuer. We will not have access to any personal information beyond that which is required to fulfill the Promotion if You qualify.

Additional Terms

  1. Each Participant in this Promotion is only eligible to receive one GeniusCash payment in the amount of $20 per Issuer for the duration of the Offer Period. The GeniusCash payment will only be fulfilled following confirmation of approval from the Issuer to Us. Quantities are limited.
  2. Approvals for completed application(s) for the Product can take up to eight (8) weeks to be processed by the Issuer. Applicants for the Product who are approved will be notified by the Issuer. Notification that the Participant has successfully qualified for the Promotion will come from Us by email. Any issues with GeniusCash fulfillment must be brought to the attention of the Platform within twelve (12) weeks of the date of the application for the Product.
  3. GeniusCash can only be claimed in accordance with the GeniusCash Terms. For greater certainty, neither We nor the Issuer are responsible for email address inaccuracies provided by the Participant. We will distribute the GeniusCash to Participants who have successfully qualified following confirmation from the Issuer that the application for the Product has been approved. Please allow up to twelve (12) weeks for GeniusCash fulfillment processing after Product approval confirmation from the Issuer to Us.
  4. We reserve the right in Our sole and absolute discretion to disqualify any individual, entity, or Participant who tampers, or attempts to tamper, with the operation of the Promotion, or violates the Terms, or for any other reason whatsoever is deemed suspicious by Us. Our decision is final, and no correspondence with the Participant shall be entered into.

Limitation of Liability

Neither We nor the Issuer are responsible for undeliverable mail or applications that cannot be processed due to technical failures of any kind, whether caused by Us, the Participant, or by any of the equipment or programming associated with the Promotion, or by any technical or human error which may limit a Participant's ability to participate in the Promotion.

The Promotion is non-transferable, and there is no payment alternative to GeniusCash. The Promotion is only open to Canadian residents who have attained the age of majority in their province/territory of residence.

General Terms

  • Use of merchant names and/or logos (including those of the Issuer and any third party besides the Platform and WeyMedia Inc.) is by permission of each respective merchant, and all trademarks remain the property of their respective owners.
  • The Promotion is not valid in conjunction with any other promotions or offers which We or the Issuer may offer from time to time.

gcAppProductOffer.faq:
What are GeniusCash Offers?

GeniusCash Offers are exclusive offers that pay you real cash when you apply and are approved for a financial product or service through creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or the GeniusCash app. Offers vary and are available for limited periods.

Can you earn real cash with GeniusCash?

Yes! Our GeniusCash Offers are real cash that we transfer straight to your bank account. Offers vary depending on the product or service, but you can earn up to $250 CAD when you apply and are approved through one of our platforms.

How do I qualify for a GeniusCash Offer?

To qualify for a GeniusCash Offer, you must 1) claim the offer through the moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app link, 2) be approved for the product or service that you applied for, and 3) meet any other criteria as outlined in the terms and conditions for that offer. Unfortunately, applications that don’t originate on one of our platforms are not eligible for GeniusCash.

I applied for an offer. How can I claim my GeniusCash?

If you applied for an offer AND were approved, you will receive your GeniusCash by PayPal or e-Transfer as per the preferences on your GeniusID account.

To be eligible for GeniusCash, you must have applied through moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or the GeniusCash app.

Please allow up to 2 weeks for us to receive your approval confirmation from our GeniusCash partner. If you haven’t received your GeniusCash and it's been 2 weeks since your application date, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

When will I receive my GeniusCash?

We try to deliver GeniusCash payments within 4 weeks but timelines may vary depending on the specific offer and when we receive confirmation of approval from our partners. If your application was approved and you haven’t received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

How can I check the status of my GeniusCash?

If you want to check the status of your GeniusCash Offer on the website, log in and navigate to your dashboard. You’ll find the GeniusCash Offers you’ve claimed listed under "Your Offers," along with the current status. In the app, go to your profile > Cash > Offers and tap the pending offer to see the status.

I haven’t received my GeniusCash yet. What should I do?

If you were approved for the product or service you applied for and have not received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please submit a ticket: On the website:

  • Log in to your dashboard
  • You’ll see a list of all GeniusCash Offers you've clicked on
  • Click the GeniusCash Offer you’d like to open a ticket for and the timeline will appear
  • Click "Open ticket", which will take you to the page to create your ticket

In the app:

  • Tap the header to go the profile page
  • Tap the Cash tab
  • Tap the Offers tab
  • Tap an offer in the list
  • Tap the Open Ticket link

Where can I find my application number?

The application reference number can be found in the email you received from our partner after applying for the product. Sometimes, it's at the end of the subject line. It may be called the Application Number, Reference Number, Case ID, PCN Number, or Application Reference Number. You may also find it in your messages when you log in to your online banking.

If you're unable to locate this number, please contact the partner directly. For privacy reasons, we are unable to retrieve your application number ourselves.

Once you locate your application reference number, please send it to us via email or update your ticket directly.

How will I receive my GeniusCash?

You’ll receive your GeniusCash payment via Interac e-Transfer or PayPal. You can select your preference by visiting your profile settings and confirming the email address for your preferred method of payment.

How can I reset my GeniusID password?

You can reset your GeniusID password from your profile in the app or online. If you’re trying to log in and can’t remember your password, select "Forgot password" and we’ll send you an email that walks you through the password reset process.

What is my GeniusID?

Your GeniusID is what you use to log into moneyGenius.ca, creditcardGenius.ca, and the GeniusCash app. No matter which platform you initially used to create your GeniusID account, you’ll use the same credentials to log into all three platforms.

Where can I find my e-Transfer password?

You can find the e-Transfer password to accept your GeniusCash payment in payment preferences section of your moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app profile. Make sure you're logged in with the same GeniusID that you used to claim the offer.

If you’re having difficulty depositing your GeniusCash payment using a web browser, please try using your mobile banking app.

If you want to bypass the security password requirement for future e-Transfers, you can enable auto deposit for e-Transfers in your bank account settings.

Am I eligible for GeniusCash if I apply directly through a financial institution?

No. To be eligible for a GeniusCash offer, you must apply through the creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or GeniusCash app offer link. Once you apply for the GeniusCash offer, you’ll be redirected to the issuer or provider's website to finalize your product or service application.

What is the GeniusCash app?

GeniusCash is a cash back rewards app that sends real cash straight to your bank account. It also helps you unlock Max credit card rewards, equip the best financial products, score big cash Offers, and earn extra bonus cash back on your everyday purchases – all while leveling up your money knowledge.

Trusted by nearly 100,000 Canadians already, the GeniusCash program has paid out $4M+ in real cash to people just like you. This is all backed by over 1,500 positive Trustpilot reviews with an average rating of 4.2 left by happy people who have banked real cash with GeniusCash.

Why should I download the GeniusCash app?

Our mission is to make money easy and fun for all Canadians. In the last 10 years, we’ve helped 7M+ Canadians do just that. The GeniusCash app is the evolution of our core mission – an industry-leading financial tool that helps Canadians make financial choices with confidence and clarity.

Why should you consider downloading the app? GeniusCash…

  • Analyzes your everyday spending to make tailored recommendations to max your existing credit card rewards
  • Rewards you with bonus extra cash back on your everyday spending
  • Gives you access to exclusive deals, promotions, and opportunities to bank real cash
  • Provides endless ways to level up your money knowledge and get rewarded for it

Is the GeniusCash app safe?

Yes, your safety and privacy are our top priorities. To securely connect your credit cards and bank accounts, we use Flinks and Plaid, trusted financial technology providers used by leading financial institutions and financial apps. They use advanced encryption and follow strict industry standards to keep your data safe. We conduct regular penetration testing to identify and address potential vulnerabilities, and we only access the data needed to provide personalized recommendations and insights. Your data is never sold, and we’re committed to being transparent about how it’s used. By combining trusted technology with responsible security practices, we ensure a safe and secure experience for all users.

Is there a GeniusCash referral program?

Yes! When you refer someone new to the GeniusCash app. and they get approved for a GeniusCash offer or connect their bank account for the first time, you’ll receive a bonus level that gives you extra cash back on your spending for a limited time. Your friend will also receive a bonus level to jumpstart their cash back from the get-go!

To refer someone, log into the GeniusCash app and navigate to the Referrals tab. Here, you’ll find your unique referral code, which you can copy to send to your friends and family. Click "More Options" to see your referral link and message that you can quickly copy and paste.

What are Genius Ratings?

Each product we evaluate is compared to similar products available in the Canadian market. We start by analyzing the product's key features, such as fees, perks, and more, assigning a score out of 5 stars to each attribute. These individual scores are then averaged to generate the final Genius Rating.

Why are there sometimes bank connectivity issues?

Canada does not yet have open banking, which means there’s no standardized system for sharing your financial data. While other regions like the US, Europe and Australia have long since adopted open banking, Canadian fintech companies like ours rely on established data aggregators, such as Flinks and Plaid, to connect to your accounts. These are trusted technology providers that are used by leading financial institutions and financial apps; however, in Canada they must use connection methods that occasionally fail to establish a connection. This can lead to an inconsistent user experience.

We’re optimistic that open banking will eventually arrive in Canada, improving the reliability of these connections. Until then, we’re doing everything we can to expand support and improve the user experience. You can learn more from our blog, Open Banking in Canada: Why We’re Still Waiting, and Why Canadians Deserve Better.

gcAppProductOffer.faq:
What are GeniusCash Offers?

GeniusCash Offers are exclusive offers that pay you real cash when you apply and are approved for a financial product or service through creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or the GeniusCash app. Offers vary and are available for limited periods.

Can you earn real cash with GeniusCash?

Yes! Our GeniusCash Offers are real cash that we transfer straight to your bank account. Offers vary depending on the product or service, but you can earn up to $250 CAD when you apply and are approved through one of our platforms.

How do I qualify for a GeniusCash Offer?

To qualify for a GeniusCash Offer, you must 1) claim the offer through the moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app link, 2) be approved for the product or service that you applied for, and 3) meet any other criteria as outlined in the terms and conditions for that offer. Unfortunately, applications that don’t originate on one of our platforms are not eligible for GeniusCash.

I applied for an offer. How can I claim my GeniusCash?

If you applied for an offer AND were approved, you will receive your GeniusCash by PayPal or e-Transfer as per the preferences on your GeniusID account.

To be eligible for GeniusCash, you must have applied through moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or the GeniusCash app.

Please allow up to 2 weeks for us to receive your approval confirmation from our GeniusCash partner. If you haven’t received your GeniusCash and it's been 2 weeks since your application date, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

When will I receive my GeniusCash?

We try to deliver GeniusCash payments within 4 weeks but timelines may vary depending on the specific offer and when we receive confirmation of approval from our partners. If your application was approved and you haven’t received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

How can I check the status of my GeniusCash?

If you want to check the status of your GeniusCash Offer on the website, log in and navigate to your dashboard. You’ll find the GeniusCash Offers you’ve claimed listed under "Your Offers," along with the current status. In the app, go to your profile > Cash > Offers and tap the pending offer to see the status.

I haven’t received my GeniusCash yet. What should I do?

If you were approved for the product or service you applied for and have not received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please submit a ticket: On the website:

  • Log in to your dashboard
  • You’ll see a list of all GeniusCash Offers you've clicked on
  • Click the GeniusCash Offer you’d like to open a ticket for and the timeline will appear
  • Click "Open ticket", which will take you to the page to create your ticket

In the app:

  • Tap the header to go the profile page
  • Tap the Cash tab
  • Tap the Offers tab
  • Tap an offer in the list
  • Tap the Open Ticket link

Where can I find my application number?

The application reference number can be found in the email you received from our partner after applying for the product. Sometimes, it's at the end of the subject line. It may be called the Application Number, Reference Number, Case ID, PCN Number, or Application Reference Number. You may also find it in your messages when you log in to your online banking.

If you're unable to locate this number, please contact the partner directly. For privacy reasons, we are unable to retrieve your application number ourselves.

Once you locate your application reference number, please send it to us via email or update your ticket directly.

How will I receive my GeniusCash?

You’ll receive your GeniusCash payment via Interac e-Transfer or PayPal. You can select your preference by visiting your profile settings and confirming the email address for your preferred method of payment.

How can I reset my GeniusID password?

You can reset your GeniusID password from your profile in the app or online. If you’re trying to log in and can’t remember your password, select "Forgot password" and we’ll send you an email that walks you through the password reset process.

What is my GeniusID?

Your GeniusID is what you use to log into moneyGenius.ca, creditcardGenius.ca, and the GeniusCash app. No matter which platform you initially used to create your GeniusID account, you’ll use the same credentials to log into all three platforms.

Where can I find my e-Transfer password?

You can find the e-Transfer password to accept your GeniusCash payment in payment preferences section of your moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app profile. Make sure you're logged in with the same GeniusID that you used to claim the offer.

If you’re having difficulty depositing your GeniusCash payment using a web browser, please try using your mobile banking app.

If you want to bypass the security password requirement for future e-Transfers, you can enable auto deposit for e-Transfers in your bank account settings.

Am I eligible for GeniusCash if I apply directly through a financial institution?

No. To be eligible for a GeniusCash offer, you must apply through the creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or GeniusCash app offer link. Once you apply for the GeniusCash offer, you’ll be redirected to the issuer or provider's website to finalize your product or service application.

What is the GeniusCash app?

GeniusCash is a cash back rewards app that sends real cash straight to your bank account. It also helps you unlock Max credit card rewards, equip the best financial products, score big cash Offers, and earn extra bonus cash back on your everyday purchases – all while leveling up your money knowledge.

Trusted by nearly 100,000 Canadians already, the GeniusCash program has paid out $4M+ in real cash to people just like you. This is all backed by over 1,500 positive Trustpilot reviews with an average rating of 4.2 left by happy people who have banked real cash with GeniusCash.

Why should I download the GeniusCash app?

Our mission is to make money easy and fun for all Canadians. In the last 10 years, we’ve helped 7M+ Canadians do just that. The GeniusCash app is the evolution of our core mission – an industry-leading financial tool that helps Canadians make financial choices with confidence and clarity.

Why should you consider downloading the app? GeniusCash…

  • Analyzes your everyday spending to make tailored recommendations to max your existing credit card rewards
  • Rewards you with bonus extra cash back on your everyday spending
  • Gives you access to exclusive deals, promotions, and opportunities to bank real cash
  • Provides endless ways to level up your money knowledge and get rewarded for it

Is the GeniusCash app safe?

Yes, your safety and privacy are our top priorities. To securely connect your credit cards and bank accounts, we use Flinks and Plaid, trusted financial technology providers used by leading financial institutions and financial apps. They use advanced encryption and follow strict industry standards to keep your data safe. We conduct regular penetration testing to identify and address potential vulnerabilities, and we only access the data needed to provide personalized recommendations and insights. Your data is never sold, and we’re committed to being transparent about how it’s used. By combining trusted technology with responsible security practices, we ensure a safe and secure experience for all users.

Is there a GeniusCash referral program?

Yes! When you refer someone new to the GeniusCash app. and they get approved for a GeniusCash offer or connect their bank account for the first time, you’ll receive a bonus level that gives you extra cash back on your spending for a limited time. Your friend will also receive a bonus level to jumpstart their cash back from the get-go!

To refer someone, log into the GeniusCash app and navigate to the Referrals tab. Here, you’ll find your unique referral code, which you can copy to send to your friends and family. Click "More Options" to see your referral link and message that you can quickly copy and paste.

What are Genius Ratings?

Each product we evaluate is compared to similar products available in the Canadian market. We start by analyzing the product's key features, such as fees, perks, and more, assigning a score out of 5 stars to each attribute. These individual scores are then averaged to generate the final Genius Rating.

Why are there sometimes bank connectivity issues?

Canada does not yet have open banking, which means there’s no standardized system for sharing your financial data. While other regions like the US, Europe and Australia have long since adopted open banking, Canadian fintech companies like ours rely on established data aggregators, such as Flinks and Plaid, to connect to your accounts. These are trusted technology providers that are used by leading financial institutions and financial apps; however, in Canada they must use connection methods that occasionally fail to establish a connection. This can lead to an inconsistent user experience.

We’re optimistic that open banking will eventually arrive in Canada, improving the reliability of these connections. Until then, we’re doing everything we can to expand support and improve the user experience. You can learn more from our blog, Open Banking in Canada: Why We’re Still Waiting, and Why Canadians Deserve Better.

†† The Tangerine $120 Money-Back Rewards Limited-time Promotional Offer (the “Offer”) is only available to new Tangerine Money-Back World Mastercard Account holders who (i) apply for a Tangerine Money-Back World Mastercard (the “Account”) by April 30, 2026, (ii) activate their Account within 45 days of approval, and (iii) have at least $1,500 in total Net Purchases posted to their Account within the 90-day promotional period beginning on the date the Tangerine Money-Back World Mastercard is activated. “Net Purchases” include purchases charged to the Account (less any refunds, returns or other similar credits) but do not include payments, Cash Advances (including Balance Transfers and Cash-Like Transactions), interest, fees, insurance premiums, adjustments or other charges. The Offer Bonus of $120 Money-Back Rewards will be credited to the Primary Cardholder’s Account within approximately 1–2 statement cycles after the 90-day promotional period provided the Account is open and in Good Standing at time of payout. Your Account is in Good Standing if it is not more than one (1) monthly statement period past due and is not closed, charged off, or in credit revoked status, all according to our credit risk policies that may change from time to time. If a Client does not meet the minimum Net Purchases dollar amount required within the promotional period, they will not receive any cashback under this Offer. Limit of one Offer per eligible Client. This Offer is non-transferable. Offer may be changed, cancelled or extended at any time. All other Account terms, including the Tangerine Money-Back Rewards Program Terms and Conditions, remain unchanged and continue to apply. See the Tangerine Credit Card Cardholder Agreement for more details, including definitions of any capitalized terms.

* At the time of Application, you will choose either two (2) or three (3) 2% Money-Back Categories (depending on your choice of Redemption Destinations as described above in Section 5 of the Tangerine Money-Back Rewards Program Terms and Conditions. If your online session ends early during the Application process and you did not have a chance to select your 2% Money-Back Categories, we will choose them on your behalf. Whether you choose your 2% Money-Back Categories or they are chosen for you, you can make one (1) 2% Money-Back Category change request at any time after the Credit Card Account opening. Any further 2% Money-Back Category change requests will take effect on the first billing date following a 90-day hold period after the previous 2% Money-Back Category change took effect. During the 90-day period, you may request a change to your 2% Money-Back Category selection at any time. However, the change will not take effect until this period has ended. If you request multiple changes to your 2% Money-Back Categories throughout this period, we will select the most recent change request as the request that is to be implemented. To review the history of changes to your Credit Card Account, log in at tangerine.ca and go to “Manage Rewards”.

11 A Promotional Rate of 1.95% will apply to any and all Balance Transfers made within 30 days of the Account opening, and will remain in effect for 6 Statement Periods from the date the last such Balance Transfer was posted to the Account (the “Promotional Rate Period”). To take advantage of this Promotional Offer, you must complete the Balance Transfer request within 30 days of Account approval. You must also activate your Card within 45 days of Account approval for the requested Balance Transfer to be processed, or the Balance Transfer will be automatically cancelled. Balance Transfers are treated as Cash Advances on your Card and do not have an interest-free grace period. Balance Transfers may not exceed the available credit on the Account. If the Balance Transfer exceeds the available credit, the Balance Transfer transaction will not be processed. A 1% Balance Transfer Fee will be charged on each Balance Transfer amount and will be immediately charged to your Credit Card. This Balance Transfer Fee is waived by Tangerine if you are a resident of the province of Quebec at the time you accept this offer. Interest does not accrue on the Balance Transfer Fee, however it is included in the Minimum Payment amount on your monthly statement. You must continue to make all of your monthly Minimum Payments by the Payment Due Dates shown on your monthly statements. If you still have an amount owing from your Balance Transfer when the Promotional Rate Period ends, the Cash Advance interest rate of 22.95% will apply to that amount. You must continue to make the Minimum Payments on your Account, regardless of whether the Balance Transfer has been processed to your Account. We don’t charge interest on new Purchases that appear on your statement for the first time if we receive full payment of the Balance on your statement (including payment of any Balance Transfers included in that Balance), by the Payment Due Date on your statement. This means you will pay interest on new purchases that appear on your statement for the first time unless we receive payment of your entire balance each month by the payment due date. For example, if you do a promotional (or non-promotional) balance transfer for $7,000 and spend $500 in new purchases during the same statement cycle, we must receive payment of the entire balance of $7,500 on or before your payment due date to avoid paying interest on your new purchases that month of $500. Balance Transfers may not be used to transfer money to or from another Tangerine Account. See the Tangerine Credit Card Cardholder Agreement for more information about how we apply payments to your Account.

gcAppProductOffer.faq:
What are GeniusCash Offers?

GeniusCash Offers are exclusive offers that pay you real cash when you apply and are approved for a financial product or service through creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or the GeniusCash app. Offers vary and are available for limited periods.

Can you earn real cash with GeniusCash?

Yes! Our GeniusCash Offers are real cash that we transfer straight to your bank account. Offers vary depending on the product or service, but you can earn up to $250 CAD when you apply and are approved through one of our platforms.

How do I qualify for a GeniusCash Offer?

To qualify for a GeniusCash Offer, you must 1) claim the offer through the moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app link, 2) be approved for the product or service that you applied for, and 3) meet any other criteria as outlined in the terms and conditions for that offer. Unfortunately, applications that don’t originate on one of our platforms are not eligible for GeniusCash.

I applied for an offer. How can I claim my GeniusCash?

If you applied for an offer AND were approved, you will receive your GeniusCash by PayPal or e-Transfer as per the preferences on your GeniusID account.

To be eligible for GeniusCash, you must have applied through moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or the GeniusCash app.

Please allow up to 2 weeks for us to receive your approval confirmation from our GeniusCash partner. If you haven’t received your GeniusCash and it's been 2 weeks since your application date, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

When will I receive my GeniusCash?

We try to deliver GeniusCash payments within 4 weeks but timelines may vary depending on the specific offer and when we receive confirmation of approval from our partners. If your application was approved and you haven’t received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please create a ticket so that we can look into your case. You can create tickets from the website dashboard or app profile page.

How can I check the status of my GeniusCash?

If you want to check the status of your GeniusCash Offer on the website, log in and navigate to your dashboard. You’ll find the GeniusCash Offers you’ve claimed listed under "Your Offers," along with the current status. In the app, go to your profile > Cash > Offers and tap the pending offer to see the status.

I haven’t received my GeniusCash yet. What should I do?

If you were approved for the product or service you applied for and have not received your GeniusCash payment after 2 weeks, please submit a ticket: On the website:

  • Log in to your dashboard
  • You’ll see a list of all GeniusCash Offers you've clicked on
  • Click the GeniusCash Offer you’d like to open a ticket for and the timeline will appear
  • Click "Open ticket", which will take you to the page to create your ticket

In the app:

  • Tap the header to go the profile page
  • Tap the Cash tab
  • Tap the Offers tab
  • Tap an offer in the list
  • Tap the Open Ticket link

Where can I find my application number?

The application reference number can be found in the email you received from our partner after applying for the product. Sometimes, it's at the end of the subject line. It may be called the Application Number, Reference Number, Case ID, PCN Number, or Application Reference Number. You may also find it in your messages when you log in to your online banking.

If you're unable to locate this number, please contact the partner directly. For privacy reasons, we are unable to retrieve your application number ourselves.

Once you locate your application reference number, please send it to us via email or update your ticket directly.

How will I receive my GeniusCash?

You’ll receive your GeniusCash payment via Interac e-Transfer or PayPal. You can select your preference by visiting your profile settings and confirming the email address for your preferred method of payment.

How can I reset my GeniusID password?

You can reset your GeniusID password from your profile in the app or online. If you’re trying to log in and can’t remember your password, select "Forgot password" and we’ll send you an email that walks you through the password reset process.

What is my GeniusID?

Your GeniusID is what you use to log into moneyGenius.ca, creditcardGenius.ca, and the GeniusCash app. No matter which platform you initially used to create your GeniusID account, you’ll use the same credentials to log into all three platforms.

Where can I find my e-Transfer password?

You can find the e-Transfer password to accept your GeniusCash payment in payment preferences section of your moneyGenius, creditcardGenius, or GeniusCash app profile. Make sure you're logged in with the same GeniusID that you used to claim the offer.

If you’re having difficulty depositing your GeniusCash payment using a web browser, please try using your mobile banking app.

If you want to bypass the security password requirement for future e-Transfers, you can enable auto deposit for e-Transfers in your bank account settings.

Am I eligible for GeniusCash if I apply directly through a financial institution?

No. To be eligible for a GeniusCash offer, you must apply through the creditcardGenius, moneyGenius, or GeniusCash app offer link. Once you apply for the GeniusCash offer, you’ll be redirected to the issuer or provider's website to finalize your product or service application.

What is the GeniusCash app?

GeniusCash is a cash back rewards app that sends real cash straight to your bank account. It also helps you unlock Max credit card rewards, equip the best financial products, score big cash Offers, and earn extra bonus cash back on your everyday purchases – all while leveling up your money knowledge.

Trusted by nearly 100,000 Canadians already, the GeniusCash program has paid out $4M+ in real cash to people just like you. This is all backed by over 1,500 positive Trustpilot reviews with an average rating of 4.2 left by happy people who have banked real cash with GeniusCash.

Why should I download the GeniusCash app?

Our mission is to make money easy and fun for all Canadians. In the last 10 years, we’ve helped 7M+ Canadians do just that. The GeniusCash app is the evolution of our core mission – an industry-leading financial tool that helps Canadians make financial choices with confidence and clarity.

Why should you consider downloading the app? GeniusCash…

  • Analyzes your everyday spending to make tailored recommendations to max your existing credit card rewards
  • Rewards you with bonus extra cash back on your everyday spending
  • Gives you access to exclusive deals, promotions, and opportunities to bank real cash
  • Provides endless ways to level up your money knowledge and get rewarded for it

Is the GeniusCash app safe?

Yes, your safety and privacy are our top priorities. To securely connect your credit cards and bank accounts, we use Flinks and Plaid, trusted financial technology providers used by leading financial institutions and financial apps. They use advanced encryption and follow strict industry standards to keep your data safe. We conduct regular penetration testing to identify and address potential vulnerabilities, and we only access the data needed to provide personalized recommendations and insights. Your data is never sold, and we’re committed to being transparent about how it’s used. By combining trusted technology with responsible security practices, we ensure a safe and secure experience for all users.

Is there a GeniusCash referral program?

Yes! When you refer someone new to the GeniusCash app. and they get approved for a GeniusCash offer or connect their bank account for the first time, you’ll receive a bonus level that gives you extra cash back on your spending for a limited time. Your friend will also receive a bonus level to jumpstart their cash back from the get-go!

To refer someone, log into the GeniusCash app and navigate to the Referrals tab. Here, you’ll find your unique referral code, which you can copy to send to your friends and family. Click "More Options" to see your referral link and message that you can quickly copy and paste.

What are Genius Ratings?

Each product we evaluate is compared to similar products available in the Canadian market. We start by analyzing the product's key features, such as fees, perks, and more, assigning a score out of 5 stars to each attribute. These individual scores are then averaged to generate the final Genius Rating.

Why are there sometimes bank connectivity issues?

Canada does not yet have open banking, which means there’s no standardized system for sharing your financial data. While other regions like the US, Europe and Australia have long since adopted open banking, Canadian fintech companies like ours rely on established data aggregators, such as Flinks and Plaid, to connect to your accounts. These are trusted technology providers that are used by leading financial institutions and financial apps; however, in Canada they must use connection methods that occasionally fail to establish a connection. This can lead to an inconsistent user experience.

We’re optimistic that open banking will eventually arrive in Canada, improving the reliability of these connections. Until then, we’re doing everything we can to expand support and improve the user experience. You can learn more from our blog, Open Banking in Canada: Why We’re Still Waiting, and Why Canadians Deserve Better.
